wrapperRole: Cameroon wrapper sets top-note, color, and burn for this vitola.
binderRole: Dominican Republic binder supports structure and integration with the filler.
fillerRole: Dominican Republic filler drives body, strength, and the flavor arc Sterlon should echo.
flavorNotes: caramel, cocoa powder, nuts, spice, cedar
avoidIf: Opposite wrapper lesson needed, or user wants island Cuban only.
whyRecommend: Recommend when teaching Don Carlos identity, AJ/Aganorsa progression, or transcript-priority catalog coverage.
sizeNote: Classic Don Carlos; CA24-09 is Eye of the Bull toro.
